problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
hypothesis: Combining Thermoelectric Seebeck coefficient maximization with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
